title: The PIE: New UKVI Compliance Metrics for Universities Take Effect Today | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP

## The PIE: New UKVI Compliance Metrics for Universities Take Effect Today

New UK Visas and Immigration compliance metrics for universities take effect today, introducing stricter benchmarks for visa refusals, enrolment and course completion rates. In The PIE , Senior Manager Jonathan Hill explains how the new Red, Amber, Green (RAG) rating system could create significant challenges for institutions, particularly given the narrow margins for compliance and universities’ exposure to factors beyond their control, including subjective visa credibility refusals.
